reminder.notes:
Fix unreachable install button on the update screen

### Features

- The What's New notes on the update screen now scroll, and Download & install is always visible.

### Bug fixes

- Fixed the update screen becoming unusable when release notes were long: the install button was
  pushed off the bottom of the screen with no way to scroll to it.
- Release notes now render as clean bullets instead of showing raw markdown headings.

ai-scanner.notes: Fixes the real cause found via v1.0.15's diagnostics: declined duplicates were older library entries whose files were already gone from disk, not a permission problem. Missing files are now labeled visibly, cleaned up instead of retried, and entries with a file that still exists get a real gallery id resolved so they use the same permission-popup delete as everything else. Adds a manual Recheck button to Find Duplicates.

mirrordrive.notes:
# MirrorDrive 0.13.2

### Features
- No new features. This release fixes the in-app updater and one playback behavior.

### Bug fixes
- The in-app update check now actually works on a real phone. It previously gave up after 8 seconds while the network request itself could take up to 20, so on a normal mobile connection the check was abandoned before it finished and the update prompt never appeared. The check is now non-blocking: the app opens immediately and the update screen appears as soon as a new version is found.
- Deleting a file that is currently playing now stops playback at the same time, instead of continuing to play a file that no longer exists.

twinclean.notes: Diagnostic fix: the 'Connect Google Drive' failure path now shows the real underlying error instead of a generic message, so sign-in issues can actually be diagnosed. No feature changes.
